distinct_type_count: How many different icon types are shown in the grid?
How many different types of icons are shown in the grid?
Count the different icon types shown in the grid.
What is the number of distinct icon types in the grid?
How many unique icon types appear in the grid?
distinct_color_count: How many different icon colors are shown in the grid?
How many different colors of icons are shown in the grid?
Count the different icon colors shown in the grid.
What is the number of distinct icon colors in the grid?
How many unique icon colors appear in the grid?

global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer

scene:visible_icon_grid.object_description: a visible grid of icon cells

query:distinct_type_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one whole grid-cell bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] in image pixel coordinates for each different icon type; for each type, choose the representative cell in the topmost row, breaking ties left to right

query:distinct_color_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one whole grid-cell bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] in image pixel coordinates for each different icon color; for each color, choose the representative cell in the topmost row, breaking ties left to right
